name: agentify-marketplace
description: Marketplace hosting the agentify plugin: a configurable bootstrap that installs a production-grade agentic harness on Claude Code repositories.

plugins.name: agentify
plugins.description: Bootstrap a production-grade agentic harness on any Claude Code repository. Configurable via agentify-config.schema.json (company, skill prefix, plugin name, marketplace URL, fleet size, loop path root, ticket prefix). Ships an agentic lifecycle layer (charter -> brainstorm -> PRD -> clarify -> plan -> tasks -> implement), plus skills for config / upgrade / self-improve / feedback / fleet-discover / decide. See commands[] for the full roster; prefix is configurable per target.
